sanskrit: तेषां सततयुक्तानां भजतां प्रीतिपूर्वकम् । ददामि बुद्धियोगं तं येन मामुपयान्ति ते ॥
hindiTranslation: उन नित्यनिरन्तर मेरेमें लगे हुए और प्रेमपूर्वक मेरा भजन करनेवाले भक्तोंको मैं वह बुद्धियोग देता हूँ, जिससे उनको मेरी प्राप्ति हो जाती है ॥
englishTranslation: To those who are always devoted and worship Me with love, I give the discernment that leads them to Me.
essence: Steady devotion itself draws forth the understanding that reaches the divine.
speaker: Krishna
simpleMeaning: Those who keep turning toward Krishna with steady love receive the discernment that leads them to him.
simpleInsight: Devotion is not blind emotion; it can become a doorway to clear understanding.
detailedMeaning: On the battlefield of Kurukshetra, Arjuna is frozen, and Krishna is showing him that love is not separate from wisdom. To those who keep worshipping with steady devotion, Krishna gives the mind that can find him.
modernRelevance: You keep returning to the same prayer, the same practice, the same honest question at 2 a.m. The answer does not always arrive as a sign; sometimes it arrives as clearer seeing.
translationLiteral: तेषां (to them) / सततयुक्तानां (of those always devoted) / भजतां (of those worshipping) / प्रीतिपूर्वकम् (with love) / ददामि (I give) / बुद्धियोगं (the yoga of discernment) / तं (that) / येन (by which) / माम् (Me) / उपयान्ति (attain) / ते (they)
